headline: Is ONEOK (OKE) Quietly Reframing Its Midstream Role With The Eiger Express Expansion?
summary: In recent days, ONEOK received upgrades from Wells Fargo and Jefferies, which highlighted the company’s midstream network as a potential beneficiary of heightened geopolitical tensions and shifting global energy flows. Both firms pointed to ONEOK’s Eiger Express Pipeline expansion and Bighorn processing plant as important projects that could help it capture additional Permian Basin volumes and support its role in U.S. energy supply chains. We’ll now examine how this focus on the Eiger...

headline: ONEOK Announces Board Transitions
summary: Gerald B. Smith and Pattye L. Moore to Retire from ONEOK Board of DirectorsTULSA, Okla., March 25, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE: OKE) today announced that directors Gerald B. Smith and Pattye L. Moore will retire from the company’s board of directors at the end of their current terms on May 20, 2026, the date of the company’s 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. Smith will retire in accordance with ONEOK’s mandatory director retirement age policy and Moore has elected to retire. “O

headline: Wall Street Raises ONEOK Price Target to $100
summary: Wells Fargo upgraded ONEOK (NYSE:OKE) to Overweight from Equal Weight on Wednesday, raising its price target to $100 from $81. The firm’s thesis centers on the Iran war creating a structural shift in global energy demand that will accelerate Permian gas and natural gas liquids supply growth, directly benefiting ONEOK’s midstream network. With shares trading ... Wall Street Raises ONEOK Price Target to $100
